top_signals.title: Trump to meet Lebanon’s president as US pushes ahead with peace deal
top_signals.summary: Lebanese army will move into ‘pilot zones’ as part of plan for Israeli withdrawal from the country
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Lack of UK jobs growth highlights challenges for Burnham
top_signals.summary: Payroll employment has flatlined while private sector wage growth eases to slowest pace in five years, ONS figures show
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Akashi crowd crush victims remembered 25 years on
top_signals.summary: Bereaved relatives, local residents and others offered prayers in front of a memorial on a pedestrian overpass where the crowd crush happened July 21, 2001.
